title: Knowledge Claim
description: A governed knowledge claim submitted to a HELM knowledge store, with dual-source provenance requirements and a multi-step promotion workflow.

claim_id.description: Unique identifier for this knowledge claim.

store_class.description: Knowledge store class: lks (long-term knowledge store) or cks (contextual knowledge store).

title.description: Short descriptive title for this claim.

body.description: Full text content of the knowledge claim.

source_artifact_ids.description: Artifact identifiers that serve as sources for this claim.

source_hashes.description: SHA-256 content hashes of source materials, for tamper detection.

provenance_score.description: Normalized provenance confidence score (0.0 = unverified, 1.0 = fully verified).

promotion_req.description: Promotion requirements that must be satisfied before this claim can be promoted.

dual_source_required.description: Whether two independent sources are required for promotion.

min_signer_count.description: Minimum number of signers required to approve promotion.

approval_profile_ref.description: Reference to the approval profile governing the promotion ceremony.

status.description: Current promotion status of this claim.
